name: buildbanner
description: Crash-proof, language-agnostic developer info banner for web apps

scripts.build: esbuild buildbanner.js --bundle --format=iife --target=es2017 --outfile=dist/buildbanner.min.js --minify && esbuild buildbanner.js --bundle --format=iife --target=es2017 --outfile=dist/buildbanner.js && node scripts/build-css.js
